llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a single consolidated package named 'Consolidated Premium Insurance Package Proposal29' that includes health (physical & mental), property, and travel coverage, as well as additional support services. This package is not explicitly listed in the ground-truth ratings. The closest equivalents for each coverage domain are the highest-tier 'Premium' or consolidated options (e.g., PrimeCare Premium Plan, EliteCare Premium Plan, PrimeHome Premium Coverage, EliteHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, EliteTravel Premium Plan), which bundle multiple comprehensive services and global coverage similar to the description of Proposal29. Among these, all share similar high-quality but over-budget characteristics, with ratings of 6 for health and property, and 6 for travel. Since Proposal29 consolidates all these high-end features, it is most logically mapped to the same rating level (6) across all domains. Additional services included (e.g., 24/7 support, wellness programs, global assistance) correspond to 'Premium Insurance Membership' in general services, which has a rating of 6. Therefore, each mapped element aligns with the ground-truth ratings of comparable premium-level offerings rated 6.
